---
title: "Guy Carleton Bigg Wither"
---

## Guy Carleton Bigg Wither

**Dates:** (1836-1860)

### Description

nephew of the Rev. William Bigg Wither

### Biography

He was fifth child of Mr Bigg Wither's eldest brother; (22 July 1845) 'a very nice little boy of nine years old' ;  lost at sea. [LG 1871]

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
